description: Default capability for the main window. Scope is kept narrow: explicit dialog/fs permissions for user-initiated file open (catalogue import) and save (CSV/JSON export). User-chosen save paths are added to scope at runtime by the save() dialog, so no static blanket path is needed. The fs:scope allowlist covers only the extracted-image scratch dir read back over the asset protocol. No http/shell plugin — all outbound HTTP runs in Rust.
